tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Teams recently completed build and acceptance testing of our 1,000th Merlin 1D engine for Falcon’s first stage! With Falcon’s reusability, recovering these engines has enabled continued reliability enhancements, making Merlin one of the most reliable rocket engines ever manufactured
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：团队最近完成了猎鹰第一阶段第 1,000 个 Merlin 1D 引擎的构建和验收测试！凭借 Falcon 的可重复使用性，回收这些发动机可以持续增强可靠性，使 Merlin 成为有史以来最可靠的火箭发动机之一

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Last year, @elonmusk brought national attention to the paper-based federal retirement process hidden deep underground in Boyers, Pennsylvania. The Last Day of Paper is more than a milestone, it is proof that government modernization can deliver real results for the American people. Thank you @POTUS and @elonmusk for the initial discussions that led to this important accomplishment: https://www.foxnews.com/politics/elon-musk-describes-limestone-mine-used-processing-federal-workers-retirement-papers-like-time-warp
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：去年，@elonmusk 引起了全国对隐藏在宾夕法尼亚州博耶斯地下深处的纸质联邦退休流程的关注。 《最后一天的纸张》不仅仅是一个里程碑，它证明政府现代化可以为美国人民带来真正的成果。感谢 @POTUS 和 @elonmusk 的初步讨论，促成了这一重要成就：https://www.foxnews.com/politics/elon-musk-describes-limestone-mine-used-processing-federal-workers-retirement-papers-like-time-warp

tweets.content: Free money, housing, etc acts as a massive financial forcing function to draw illegals to America and Europe
tweets.translated: 免费的金钱、住房等发挥着巨大的金融强迫作用，吸引非法移民前往美国和欧洲

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: July. holidays? no, numbers. @BNBCHAIN doesn’t stop for the summer. - 65.2M $BNB burned so far, out of the original 200M supply. at today’s price (~$550), that’s roughly $35.9B… - 35 quarterly burns already completed. - 134.79M circulating today. - 34.79M left before hitting the 100M hard cap the 36th burn scheduled for this month. no pause, no slowdown, just steady deflation quarter after quarter. BuildNBurn.
tweets.translated: RT @cz_binance：七月。假期？不，数字。 @BNBCHAIN 不会在夏天停止。 - 到目前为止，已有 6520 万美元 BNB 被烧毁，超出了最初的 2 亿供应量。以今天的价格（~$550），大约是 $35.9B… - 35 个季度销毁已经完成。 - 今天流通量为 134.79M。 - 在本月计划的第 36 次销毁达到 100M 硬上限之前还剩 3479M。没有停顿，没有放缓，只是一个又一个季度稳定的通货紧缩。构建N燃烧。

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: CZ : Binance US was built in 2019 as a completely separate company. Own matching engine, own wallets, nothing shared with http://Binance.com Through CZ's entire Fight with the US government, Binance US was never part of it. No charges. Not in the plea agreement. It did face an SEC civil lawsuit and lost banking access for years because of it. Still stayed afloat. Still stayed profitable. Now banking is back. Zero-fee trading is live. Binance US is expanding again. Build separate. Stayed clean. That's the Binance US story 💛💛 Cc @ClipX0_ @cz_binance @BinanceUS
tweets.translated: RT @cz_binance：CZ：Binance US 成立于 2019 年，是一家完全独立的公司。自己的匹配引擎，自己的钱包，没有与 http://Binance.com 共享任何内容 在 CZ 与美国政府的整个斗争中，Binance US 从未参与其中。不收费。认罪协议中没有。它确实面临着美国证券交易委员会的民事诉讼，并因此失去了多年的银行业务准入资格。仍然漂浮着。仍然保持盈利。现在银行业又回来了。零费用交易已上线。币安美国再次扩张。分开建造。保持干净。这就是币安美国的故事💛💛 抄送@ClipX0_ @cz_binance @BinanceUS

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: Smart money used to mean knowing the right people, being in the right rooms. Now it means having the right agents. For years, building one took five tools, four logins, and a painful month of work. Today, it takes just a single prompt. BNB Agent Studio is live on BNB Smart Chain. Open @cursor_ai or Claude Code, describe the agent you want, and it ships to the chain with its own onchain identity, its own wallet, and a way to pay its own bills. The whole thing runs on @awscloud's Bedrock AgentCore, so your agent stays online long after you've closed your laptop. This is the start of the Smart Money Era. Capital that works for you instead of waiting for you to move it. Agents that monitor markets while you sleep, rebalance positions you'd never get to in time, and hunt yield without checking dashboards. Try BNB Agent Studio for free for a limited time with GitHub login only, with no AWS account or credit card needed. Read the full breakdown in our blog 👇 https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-agent-studio-is-live-on-bnb-chain-ai-agents-from-one-prompt
tweets.translated: RT by @cz_binance：聪明的钱曾经意味着认识正确的人，在正确的房间里。现在这意味着拥有合适的代理商。多年来，构建一个应用程序需要五个工具、四次登录和一个月的痛苦工作。如今，只需一个提示即可。 BNB Agent Studio已上线BNB智能链。打开 @cursor_ai 或 Claude Code，描述你想要的代理，它就会以自己的链上身份、自己的钱包和支付自己账单的方式运送到链上。整个过程在 @awscloud 的 Bedrock AgentCore 上运行，因此您的代理在您关闭笔记本电脑后仍能保持在线状态。这是智能货币时代的开始。资本为你服务，而不是等待你移动它。代理在您睡觉时监控市场，重新平衡您永远无法及时到达的头寸，并在不检查仪表板的情况下寻找收益。只需登录 GitHub，即可在有限时间内免费试用 BNB Agent Studio，无需 AWS 账户或信用卡。请阅读我们博客中的完整细分：https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-agent-studio-is-live-on-bnb-chain-ai-agents-from-one-prompt

tweets.content: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: I just realized Boston Dynamics CEO shared the same sentiment: “Robotics is next. America’s next 250 years will be built by robots”. However, currently China accounts for 54%+ of all global robotics deployments. - calls for Internet scaleable database of physical world (kinda got reminded of Niantic that has a huge dataset from Pokemon Go) - dedicated National robotics strategy to compete against China’s leadership in this space - ISO + regulation for robotics safety This is all high level: But my prioritize thought process is how do we support and scale a Made in USA supply chain for robotics/humanoids? I’ve been hammering home rare earths for the longest time, that the US isn’t doing enough to subsidize or scale this industry. But another thing to take note is subsidies for components, forcing $TSLA and others to use Chinese suppliers over Western ones, even if assembly is done in USA… to keep costs down. Which is why I’ve liked Agility Robotics $CCXI since they source 75% of parts from the US, despite higher BOM to start out with. Regardless it’s pretty clear this Robotics is coming and becoming a national security priority: From the days of backflipping humanoid YT videos.
tweets.translated: 我刚刚意识到波士顿动力公司首席执行官也有同样的观点：“机器人是下一个。美国的下一个 250 年将由机器人建造”。然而，目前中国占全球机器人部署总量的 54% 以上。 - 呼吁物理世界的互联网可扩展数据库（有点像 Niantic，它拥有来自 Pokemon Go 的庞大数据集） - 专门的国家机器人战略，以与中国在这一领域的领导地位竞争 - ISO + 机器人安全法规 这都是高水平的：但我的优先考虑过程是我们如何支持和扩展美国制造的机器人/类人机器人供应链？长期以来，我一直在强调稀土，美国在补贴或扩大这个行业方面做得不够。但另一件事需要注意的是对零部件的补贴，迫使特斯拉和其他公司使用中国供应商而不是西方供应商，即使组装是在美国完成的……以降低成本。这就是为什么我喜欢 Agility Robotics $CCXI，因为他们 75% 的零件来自美国，尽管一开始的 BOM 较高。不管怎样，很明显，这种机器人技术即将到来，并成为国家安全的优先事项：从 YT 视频后空翻的时代开始。

tweets.content: $IREN founders award themselves $1.14B+ of stock based compensation. Vesting over 4 years timeframe. This is amid their active $6,000,000,000 ATM. I’m not going to say anything but I think it speaks for itself.
tweets.translated: $IREN 创始人奖励自己 $1.14B+ 的股票薪酬。行权期限超过 4 年。这是他们活跃的 6,000,000,000 美元 ATM 中的一个。我不会说什么，但我认为它本身就说明了一切。

tweets.content: Wells Fargo: $META intent to sell excess compute is a positive signal around underlying demand and unit economics of AI. “Despite this shift, we don’t expect a pullback in Meta’s capex or that overall compute needs are lower” Regarding Neoclouds: WF thinks it validated the massive AI infra opportunity as well as acquisition opportunities. Despite any potential competition for Neoclouds. I’m inclined to agree with Wells Fargo here and say markets completely misunderstood Meta’s excess compute comment.
tweets.translated: 富国银行：$META 出售多余计算能力的意图是围绕人工智能的潜在需求和单位经济效益的积极信号。 “尽管发生了这种转变，我们预计 Meta 的资本支出不会出现回落，也不会导致整体计算需求下降。” 关于 Neoclouds：WF 认为它验证了巨大的 AI 基础设施机会以及收购机会。尽管 Neoclouds 存在任何潜在的竞争。我倾向于同意富国银行的观点，认为市场完全误解了 Meta 的过度计算评论。
